steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage says Chicago has “everything from monumental sculptures … to innovative street art,” which signals a wide range or variety of public art.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B, “breadth of,” directly expresses that wide range.
The other three either introduce ideas not mentioned (controversy, apathy, confusion) or contradict the positive tone.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
